xl.$description: ⚠️ RAW VALUE — breakpoint xl = 1200px. Large desktop.

hide.$description: ⚠️ RAW VALUE — z-index hide = -1. Do not use directly.

base.$description: ⚠️ RAW VALUE — z-index base = 0. Do not use directly.

dropdown.$description: ⚠️ RAW VALUE — z-index dropdown = 1000. Do not use directly.

sticky.$description: ⚠️ RAW VALUE — z-index sticky = 1100. Do not use directly.

overlay.$description: ⚠️ RAW VALUE — z-index overlay = 1200. Do not use directly.

modal.$description: ⚠️ RAW VALUE — z-index modal = 1300. Do not use directly.

toast.$description: ⚠️ RAW VALUE — z-index toast = 1400. Do not use directly.

tooltip.$description: ⚠️ RAW VALUE — z-index tooltip = 1500. Do not use directly.

instant.$description: ⚠️ RAW VALUE — duration instant = 100ms. Do not use directly.

fast.$description: ⚠️ RAW VALUE — duration fast = 200ms. Do not use directly.

normal.$description: ⚠️ RAW VALUE — duration normal = 300ms. Do not use directly.

slow.$description: ⚠️ RAW VALUE — duration slow = 500ms. Do not use directly.

primary.$description: ⚠️ RAW VALUE — 中文主字型: PingFang TC (蘋方).

english.$description: ⚠️ RAW VALUE — 英文主字型: SF Pro (Apple San Francisco).

fallback.$description: ⚠️ RAW VALUE — System fallback font stack.

label-2xs.$description: ⚠️ RAW VALUE — 8px. Smallest readable label size. Do not use directly.

body-md-alt.$description: ⚠️ RAW VALUE — 13px. Legacy body size for migration compatibility. Do not use directly.

none.$description: ⚠️ RAW VALUE — border-width none = 0px. Do not use directly.

hairline.$description: ⚠️ RAW VALUE — border-width hairline = 0.5px. Do not use directly.

none.$description: 0px. No spacing. Use for flush-aligned elements.

2xs.$description: 4px. Tightest spacing. Use for inline icon-to-text gaps, compact badge padding.

xs.$description: 8px. Use for button internal padding, form field gaps, tag spacing, tight card padding.

sm.$description: 12px. Use for standard component internal padding, list item vertical padding.

md.$description: 16px. Use for card padding, section gaps, form group spacing, page margin on mobile.

lg.$description: 24px. Use for large section gaps, modal padding, content area spacing.

xl.$description: 32px. Use for major section separation, hero padding, page-level spacing.

2xl.$description: 48px. Use for page top/bottom margin, large hero gaps.

3xl.$description: 64px. Use for landing page section separation, extra-large whitespace.

4xl.$description: 96px. Use for hero banner vertical padding, major page-level separation.

icon-xs.$description: 12px. Extra-small icons. Use for compact tag icons (e.g. 露天心選 brand badge icon), inline micro-indicators.

icon-sm.$description: 16px. Small icons. Use for inline indicators, status dots, compact UI icons.

icon-md.$description: 24px. Standard icons. Use for navigation icons, action icons, form field icons.

icon-lg.$description: 32px. Large icons. Use for empty state icons, feature highlight icons.

avatar-sm.$description: 32px. Small avatar. Use for comment lists, compact user mentions.

avatar-md.$description: 40px. Standard avatar. Use for user profiles, seller info, review cards. Also minimum touch target.

avatar-lg.$description: 48px. Large avatar. Use for profile headers, seller spotlight, chat avatars.

thumbnail-sm.$description: 64px. Small thumbnail. Use for cart item images, order history thumbnails.

thumbnail-md.$description: 80px. Medium thumbnail. Use for search result images, related product thumbnails.

thumbnail-lg.$description: 96px. Large thumbnail. Use for featured product cards, category banners.

product-card.$description: 128px. Product card image. Use for grid product cards, listing images.

product-hero.$description: 192px. Product hero image. Use for product detail main image, promotional hero.

xs.$description: 16px. Control extra-small height. Use for tag s, compact inline elements.

sm.$description: 20px. Control small height. Use for tag m, small chips.

md.$description: 28px. Control medium height. Use for tag l.

default.$description: 32px. Control default height. Base controlHeight per Ant Design convention. Use for button sm, tab sm, search bar.

lg.$description: 36px. Control large height. Use for tag lg-alt.

xl.$description: 40px. Control extra-large height. Minimum touch target per WCAG/HIG. Use for button md, tab md, bottom-nav center button.

2xl.$description: 44px. Control 2x-large height. Use for tab lg.

3xl.$description: 48px. Control 3x-large height. Use for button lg, tab xl, navigation bar.

4xl.$description: 52px. Control 4x-large height. Use for button xl.

avatar-xs.$description: 24px. Avatar extra-small. Use for inline mentions, notification lists.

avatar-xl.$description: 80px. Avatar extra-large. Use for featured topics, seller grid, category highlights.

avatar-2xl.$description: 96px. Avatar 2x-large. Use for category index hero thumbnails.

none.$description: 0px. No rounding. Use for full-width banners, table cells, square thumbnails.

sm.$description: 4px. Subtle rounding. Use for tags, small badges, compact chips.

md.$description: 8px. Standard component radius. Use for buttons, inputs, cards, dropdowns. Default for most interactive components.

lg.$description: 12px. Prominent rounding. Use for modal dialogs, bottom sheets, large cards.

xl.$description: 16px. Extra rounding. Use for floating action buttons, image cards, promotional containers.

full.$description: 9999px. Fully rounded. Use for pills, avatars, circular badges, round icon buttons.

none.$description: No shadow. Use for flat surfaces, inline content, table rows.

low.$description: Subtle lift. Use for cards at rest, raised buttons, default card state.

medium.$description: Moderate lift. Use for active cards, dropdown menus, hover state cards.

high.$description: Prominent. Use for navigation bars, FABs, sticky elements.

higher.$description: High. Use for drawers, sticky headers, floating action panels.

highest.$description: Highest. Use for modal dialogs, full-screen overlays, toast notifications.

transparent.$description: Fully transparent. Use for hidden elements, animation start states.

hover.$description: 0.08. MD3 hover state layer. Apply as overlay on interactive elements on hover.

focus.$description: 0.12. MD3 focus state layer. Apply as overlay on focused interactive elements.

pressed.$description: 0.12. MD3 pressed state layer. Apply as overlay on active/pressed elements.

dragged.$description: 0.16. MD3 dragged state layer. Apply as overlay on elements being dragged.

disabled.$description: 0.38. Disabled state opacity. Apply to entire disabled component (button, input, etc).

medium.$description: 0.5. Medium opacity. Use for semi-transparent backgrounds, watermarks.

opaque.$description: 1.0. Fully opaque. Default state for all visible elements.

hover-overlay.$description: Opacity for hover overlay. Use for interactive elements on hover state. Do NOT use for disabled states.

pressed-overlay.$description: Opacity for pressed overlay. Use for interactive elements on pressed/active state. Do NOT use for disabled states.

hide.$description: -1. Hidden layer. Use for off-screen or hidden elements.

dropdown.$description: 1000. Dropdown layer. Use for dropdown menus, select popups, autocomplete.

sticky.$description: 1100. Sticky layer. Use for sticky headers, floating cart button, sticky nav.

overlay.$description: 1200. Overlay layer. Use for backdrop/scrim behind modals and drawers.

modal.$description: 1300. Modal layer. Use for modal dialogs, bottom sheets, drawers.

toast.$description: 1400. Toast layer. Use for toast notifications, snackbars. Must be above modals.

tooltip.$description: 1500. Tooltip layer. Highest z-index. Use for tooltips, popovers.

instant.$description: 100ms. Use for hover feedback, micro-interactions, toggle switches.

fast.$description: 200ms. Use for fade in/out, button state changes, tab switches.

normal.$description: 300ms. Use for modal open/close, slide transitions, page transitions.

slow.$description: 500ms. Use for complex animations, skeleton loading fade, elaborate transitions.

primary.$description: PingFang TC. Primary Chinese font for all UI text.

3xl.$description: 64px. Hero banner headline. Use for homepage major promotions, campaign landing hero.

2xl.$description: 56px. Large display. Use for event pages, sale countdown headers.

xl.$description: 48px. Display. Use for section hero titles, large promotional text.

lg.$description: 40px. Use for page hero titles, major section headers.

md.$description: 36px. Use for secondary hero text, large card titles.

sm.$description: 32px. Use for prominent section titles, modal headers.

lg.$description: 28px. Use for page titles, major section headings.

md.$description: 24px. Use for card group titles, sidebar section headers.

sm.$description: 20px. Use for card titles, list section headers, dialog titles.

lg.$description: 18px. Use for product card titles, navigation section labels.

md.$description: 16px. Use for sub-section titles, form section labels, tab labels.

sm.$description: 14px. Use for list item titles, compact card titles, table column headers.

lg.$description: 16px. Large body text. Use for product descriptions, article content, important form labels.

md.$description: 14px. Standard body text. Use for paragraphs, descriptions, form labels, list content.

sm.$description: 12px. Small body text. Use for captions, helper text, footnotes, timestamps.

md-alt.$description: 13px. Legacy body text size. Use for migrating old 13px body text. Prefer body/md (14px) for new designs.

lg.$description: 14px. Large label. Use for button text, navigation labels, tab labels.

md.$description: 12px. Standard label. Use for form labels, tag text, badge text, table cell text.

sm.$description: 11px. Small label. Use for secondary badges, compact metadata, footnotes.

xs.$description: 10px. Extra small. Use for promo tags (店取/宅配免運), discount badges, compact sale info.

2xs.$description: 8px. Smallest label. Use for extreme compact badges, corner discount tags (7.1折). Min readable size for Chinese.

medium.$description: 500. Emphasized body text, active tab labels, selected navigation.

semibold.$description: 600. Card titles, section headers, product names.

bold.$description: 700. Page titles, prices, key CTAs, primary headings.

tight.$description: 1.2. Use for display text, large headings, hero titles where compact leading is needed.

normal.$description: 1.4. Use for titles, labels, short text blocks. Default for most UI text.

relaxed.$description: 1.5. Use for body text, paragraphs, product descriptions. Optimal readability.

loose.$description: 1.75. Use for long-form reading, help articles, terms & conditions.

tight.$description: -0.02em. Use for display/headline text where tighter tracking improves appearance.

normal.$description: 0em. Default. Use for body text, standard UI.

wide.$description: 0.02em. Use for labels, button text, small caps.

wider.$description: 0.04em. Use for all-caps labels, badge text, overline text.

none.$description: No text decoration. Default for most text elements.

underline.$description: Underline. Use for hyperlinks, text links within content, emphasised inline text.

line-through.$description: Strikethrough. Use for original price (原價刪除線), sold-out items, completed todo items, deprecated content.

none.$description: 0px. No border. Use for borderless cards, flat buttons.

hairline.$description: 0.5px. Hairline border. Use for subtle dividers on retina screens.

default.$description: 1px. Default border. Use for input fields, card borders, dividers.

focus.$description: 2px. Focus border. Use for focused inputs, selected cards, active tab indicator.

active.$description: 3px. Active/emphasis border. Use for active tab bottom border, selected navigation indicator.

solid.$description: Solid border. Default for all borders.

dashed.$description: Dashed border. Use for upload drop zones, empty state containers, placeholder areas.

none.$description: No border style. Use with border-width-none.

mobile.$description: 4 columns on mobile (<768px). Standard mobile grid.

tablet.$description: 8 columns on tablet (768~991px). Standard tablet grid.

desktop.$description: 12 columns on desktop (≥992px). Standard desktop grid.

default.$description: 24px gutter. Use for tablet and desktop layouts.

primary.$description: Primary brand color. Use for primary buttons, active nav, key CTAs, selected states. Do NOT use for error states, body text. Pair with on-primary.

on-primary.$description: Foreground on primary. Use for text/icons on primary backgrounds. Pair with primary.

primary-container.$description: Soft primary bg. Use for chips, badges, selected list items. Pair with on-primary-container.

on-primary-container.$description: Foreground on primary-container. Text/icons on soft primary bg.

secondary.$description: Secondary brand accent. Use for secondary buttons, filter chips, progress bars. Pair with on-secondary.

on-secondary.$description: Foreground on secondary. Text/icons on secondary backgrounds.

secondary-container.$description: Soft secondary bg. Use for toggles, secondary highlights. Pair with on-secondary-container.

on-secondary-container.$description: Foreground on secondary-container. Text/icons on soft secondary bg.

surface.$description: Default page background. Base layer of all UI — pages, modals, cards, sheets.

on-surface.$description: Primary text/icons on surface. Headings, body text, primary icons.

on-surface-variant.$description: Secondary text. Captions, placeholders, helper text, metadata. Do NOT use for primary content.

on-surface-medium.$description: Medium emphasis foreground. Neutral/700 (#47484D). Between on-surface (#33343B) and on-surface-variant (#73747B). Use for secondary tab inactive text, or any context needing medium-emphasis text on both white and brand surfaces.

surface-dim.$description: Dimmed surface. Page bg behind cards, list area grey bg, secondary panels, sidebar.

surface-container.$description: Standard container bg. Card backgrounds, input fields, dropdown menus.

surface-container-high.$description: Elevated container. Search bar, sticky header, floating card, nav bar.

inverse-surface.$description: Inverted surface for snackbars, tooltips. Pair with inverse-on-surface.

inverse-on-surface.$description: Text on inverse-surface. Snackbar text, tooltip labels.

surface-brand.$description: Brand color full surface. Top nav bar, promo hero sections, brand-colored headers. Pair with on-surface-brand.

surface-brand-dim.$description: Brand color light surface. Subtle brand bg, promo banner light bg, badge bg, campaign section.

on-surface-brand.$description: Foreground on brand surfaces. White text/icons for readability on brand color bg.

outline.$description: Default border. Input borders (default state), card outlines, dividers with clear visibility.

outline-variant.$description: Subtle border. Decorative dividers, secondary card borders, table separators.

error.$description: Error/destructive states. Form validation errors, destructive buttons, alert banners. NEVER use ref/color/red directly. Pair with on-error.

on-error.$description: Foreground on error. Text/icons on error backgrounds.

error-container.$description: Soft error bg. Inline error banners, form field error highlights. Pair with on-error-container.

on-error-container.$description: Foreground on error-container. Error message text, error icons on light red bg.

warning.$description: Warning states. Warning alerts, limit indicators, non-blocking issues. Pair with on-warning.

on-warning.$description: Foreground on warning. Dark text for readability on yellow. Do NOT use white on yellow.

warning-container.$description: Soft warning bg. Warning banners, notice blocks. Pair with on-warning-container.

on-warning-container.$description: Foreground on warning-container. Warning text on light yellow bg.

success.$description: Success confirmation. Success alerts, verified badges, completed steps, payment confirmed. Pair with on-success.

on-success.$description: Foreground on success. Text/icons on success backgrounds.

success-container.$description: Soft success bg. Success banners, order confirmation blocks. Pair with on-success-container.

on-success-container.$description: Foreground on success-container. Success text on light green bg.

info.$description: Informational states. Info alerts, help tooltips, status indicators. Pair with on-info.

on-info.$description: Foreground on info. Text/icons on info backgrounds.

info-container.$description: Soft info bg. Info banners, help blocks, feature announcements. Pair with on-info-container.

on-info-container.$description: Foreground on info-container. Info text on light blue bg.

scrim.$description: Modal backdrop (60% black). Behind modal dialogs, bottom sheets, full-screen overlays.

scrim-medium.$description: Medium overlay (40% black). Semi-transparent backdrops, image overlays.

scrim-light.$description: Light overlay (15% black). Hover overlays, pressed states on thumbnails.

price.$description: Price highlight color. Red for promotional price emphasis. Use for current price display. NOT for error states — use sys/color/error for errors.

on-price.$description: Foreground on price backgrounds. White text on red price badges.

primary-container-dim.$description: Light orange tinted background. Use for subtle primary-brand surface tints (e.g. tag filter active background).

surface-container-low.$description: Light neutral background surface. Use for inactive filter containers, secondary card backgrounds.

primary-variant.$description: Lighter primary brand variant. Use for active/hover states where full primary (#FF963B) is too strong.

border-radius.$description: Button corner radius. 8px for all sizes.

font-weight.$description: Button font weight. 600 for all sizes.

padding-h.$description: Button sm horizontal padding. 8px. Mobile CTA, compact actions.

font-size.$description: Button sm font size. 12px.

icon-size.$description: Button sm icon size. References comp/icon/sm (16px).

gap.$description: Button sm gap between icon and text. 4px.

min-height.$description: Button sm minimum height. 32px. Compact touch target.

padding-h.$description: Button md horizontal padding. 16px. Default size for most contexts.

font-size.$description: Button md font size. 14px.

icon-size.$description: Button md icon size. References comp/icon/md (24px).

gap.$description: Button md gap between icon and text. 8px.

min-height.$description: Button md minimum height. 40px. Standard touch target.

padding-h.$description: Button lg horizontal padding. 24px. Desktop hero CTA, prominent actions.

font-size.$description: Button lg font size. 14px with heavier weight.

icon-size.$description: Button lg icon size. References comp/icon/md (24px).

gap.$description: Button lg gap between icon and text. 8px.

min-height.$description: Button lg minimum height. 48px. Large touch target.

padding-h.$description: Button xl horizontal padding. 32px. Large desktop hero CTA, landing page actions.

font-size.$description: Button xl font size. 16px. Larger text for wide screens.

icon-size.$description: Button xl icon size. References comp/icon/md (24px).

min-height.$description: Button xl minimum height. 52px. Prominent touch/click target.

background.$description: Primary button default background. Dark neutral surface. Highest-priority CTA: submit, confirm, next. One per section max.

text-color.$description: Primary button default text. Brand orange on dark surface.

border-color.$description: Primary button default border. Same as background, no visible border.

icon-color.$description: Primary button icon color. Aliases text-color (Ant Design currentColor pattern). Separate token per governance §12.3, same value by default.

background.$description: Primary button hover background. Same tone, opacity change handles hover.
Primary button pressed background.
Primary button disabled background.

text-color.$description: Primary button disabled text color.

opacity.$description: Secondary button hover opacity. Fully opaque.

background.$description: Secondary button hover bg. Darker orange.

border-color.$description: Secondary button hover border. Matches hover bg (no visible border).

background.$description: Secondary button pressed bg. Darker orange.
Secondary button disabled bg. Same color but with reduced opacity.

text-color.$description: Secondary button disabled text.

background.$description: Secondary button bg. Brand orange #FF963B.

text-color.$description: Secondary button text. White on orange.

border-color.$description: Secondary button border. Same as bg (no visible border).

icon-color.$description: Secondary button icon color. Aliases text-color (Ant Design currentColor pattern). White on brand orange.

border-width.$description: Secondary button default border width. 0 — filled style has no visible border.

background.$description: Tertiary button bg. White/transparent.

text-color.$description: Tertiary button text. Brand orange.

border-color.$description: Tertiary button border. Brand orange outline.

icon-color.$description: Tertiary button icon color. Aliases text-color (Ant Design currentColor pattern). Brand orange.

background.$description: Tertiary button disabled bg.

text-color.$description: Tertiary button disabled text. Faded.

border-width.$description: Tertiary button disabled border width. 0.5px hairline.

background.$description: Tertiary button hover bg. Light orange tint.

border-color.$description: Tertiary button hover border. Brand orange.

background.$description: Ghost button bg. Transparent.

text-color.$description: Ghost button text. Brand orange.

icon-color.$description: Ghost button icon color. Aliases text-color (Ant Design currentColor pattern). Brand orange.

background.$description: Ghost button hover bg. Subtle orange tint.

border-radius.$description: Tab corner radius. 8px.

indicator-height.$description: Tab indicator height. 3px hardcoded, below base-4 scale. Rounded pill shape at bottom of active tab. Sits above the full-width divider.

padding-h.$description: Tab sm horizontal padding. 12px. Mobile tab bars.

font-size.$description: Tab sm font size. 12px.

padding-h.$description: Tab md horizontal padding. 16px. Standard tab size.

font-size.$description: Tab md font size. 14px.

padding-h.$description: Tab lg horizontal padding. 24px. Desktop navigation tabs.

font-size.$description: Tab lg font size. 14px with medium weight.

background.$description: Active tab bg. Light orange tint.

text-color.$description: Active tab text. Brand orange.

indicator-color.$description: Active tab bottom indicator. Brand orange.

padding-h.$description: Tab xl horizontal padding. 32px. Wide desktop navigation.

font-size.$description: Tab xl font size. 16px.

background.$description: Inactive tab bg. White/transparent.

text-color.$description: Inactive tab text. Subdued grey.

background.$description: Tab hover bg. Light grey tint.

text-color.$description: Tab hover text color. Darker than inactive, lighter than active. Desktop only. Pair with comp/tab/hover/background.

indicator-color.$description: Secondary emphasis active indicator. Neutral/800 (#33343B). Two use cases: (1) second-level tabs when primary emphasis exists on same page, (2) tabs on orange/brand-color background where primary indicator is invisible.

text-color.$description: Secondary emphasis active text. Neutral/800 (#33343B), font-weight bold. Pairs with secondary indicator.

background.$description: Secondary emphasis active background. No brand tint, stays neutral white. On orange backgrounds, override to transparent via Variable Mode (Phase 3).

text-color.$description: Secondary emphasis inactive text. Neutral/700 (#47484D), font-weight regular. Readable on both white and orange backgrounds.

icon-size.$description: Tag icon size for icon+text variant. 12px. Shared by all tag roles.

icon-gap.$description: Gap between icon and text in tag. 2px hardcoded — below spacing scale minimum (4px). Shared by all roles.

min-height.$description: Tag s min-height. 16px. Shipping badges, discount corners on product card.

font-size.$description: Tag s font size. 8px. Micro text for compact badges.

padding-h.$description: Tag s horizontal padding. 4px.

padding-v.$description: Tag s vertical padding. 1px hardcoded. Minimal for compact badges.

min-height.$description: Tag m min-height. 20px. Brand badges on product card, prize level tags.

font-size.$description: Tag m font size. 10px. Standard small tag text.

font-weight.$description: Tag m font weight. 600. Emphasis for small tags.

padding-h.$description: Tag m horizontal padding. 8px.

min-height.$description: Tag l min-height. 28px. Default interactive size. Filter chips, search history, Web filter. Core size for Ichiban filter tags.

font-size.$description: Tag l font size. 13px. Standard readable filter text.

font-weight.$description: Tag l font weight. 500. Medium weight for interactive tags.

padding-h.$description: Tag l horizontal padding. 12px.

min-height.$description: Tag lg-alt minimum height. 36px. Use for Action Sheet filter tags requiring larger touch targets.

padding-h.$description: Tag lg-alt horizontal padding. 8px (p-8). Uniform padding for Action Sheet tags.

padding-v.$description: Tag lg-alt vertical padding. 8px (p-8). Uniform padding for Action Sheet tags.

font-size.$description: Tag lg-alt font size. 14px (body-md). Readable size for Action Sheet selection.

font-weight.$description: Tag lg-alt font weight. Medium. Balanced readability for Action Sheet tags.

border-radius.$description: Tag lg-alt border radius. Pill shape (9999px). Rounded capsule for Action Sheet tags.
Filter tag border-radius. Ruten default=8px (rounded). Ichiban overrides to 999px (pill) via Variable Mode in Phase 3.

background.$description: Filter tag normal state bg. Neutral surface for unselected filter options. Used in search facets (App), category tabs, IP/series filter (Ichiban).

text-color.$description: Filter tag normal state text. Dark text on neutral surface.

border-color.$description: Filter tag normal state border. Subtle outline. Optional — some filter tags have no border in normal state.

border-width.$description: Filter tag normal state border width. 1px.

background.$description: Filter tag active/selected state bg. Brand orange fill indicates active selection. Ichiban dark theme uses brand/500.

text-color.$description: Filter tag active state text. White on orange for high contrast.

border-color.$description: Filter tag active state border. Matches background for seamless look. Some variants use outline border on white bg instead.

border-width.$description: Filter tag active state border width. 1px.

opacity.$description: Filter tag disabled state opacity. 0.38. Applied when no options available.

border-color.$description: Filter tag error border color. Use for required-field validation feedback when no option is selected.

border-width.$description: Filter tag error border width. Same as normal border width for consistent stroke.

background.$description: Filter tag error background. Same as normal background — error is communicated via border color only.

text-color.$description: Filter tag error text color. Same as normal text — error is communicated via border color only.

font-size.$description: Filter tag suffix text font size. Small label size for secondary count/unit text.

color.$description: Filter tag suffix text color. Muted tone to visually subordinate suffix to main label.

separator-color.$description: Filter tag suffix separator (pipe) color. Subtle divider between main label and suffix.

border-radius.$description: Display tag border-radius. 4px small rounded rect. Static labels on product cards and product pages. Consistent across all brands.

background.$description: Display tag primary bg. Orange. For brand badges: 商城, 品牌旗艦.

text-color.$description: Display tag primary text. White on orange.

background.$description: Display tag primary-container bg. Soft orange. For promo: 天天超划算, 熱銷首選, 鐵血的孤兒.

text-color.$description: Display tag primary-container text. Dark orange on soft orange.

background.$description: Display tag info bg. Blue. For shipping/delivery: 預購, 3天內出貨.

text-color.$description: Display tag info text. White on blue.

background.$description: Display tag info-container bg. Light blue. For 店到家宅配.

text-color.$description: Display tag info-container text. Dark blue.

background.$description: Display tag success bg. Green. For certifications: 退貨險, 3C聯盟.

text-color.$description: Display tag success text. White on green.

background.$description: Display tag success-container bg. Light green. For 隔日到貨.

text-color.$description: Display tag success-container text. Dark green.

background.$description: Display tag error bg. Light red. For inventory status: 已售完.

text-color.$description: Display tag error text. Dark red.

background.$description: Display tag warning bg. Light yellow. For time-limited: 6期0利率.

text-color.$description: Display tag warning text. Dark yellow.

background.$description: Display tag price bg. Red. For promo price tags: 免運$99 corner badge, 露天心選.

text-color.$description: Display tag price text. White on red.

background.$description: Display tag neutral bg. Grey surface. For generic labels: AD, 可開發票.

text-color.$description: Display tag neutral text. Muted dark text.

border-radius.$description: Action tag border-radius. 999px pill shape. Consistent across all brands for dismissible and navigational action tags.

background.$description: Dismissible action tag bg. Neutral surface. For history search tags with close (✕) icon: 火影忍者 ✕.

text-color.$description: Dismissible action tag text. Dark text.

close-icon-color.$description: Dismissible action tag close (✕) icon color. Muted, less prominent than text.

close-icon-size.$description: Dismissible action tag close (✕) icon size. 16px.

background.$description: Navigational action tag bg. Neutral surface. For recommended search keywords: hyread, 變形金剛.

text-color.$description: Navigational action tag text. Dark text.

border-radius.$description: Promo corner base radius value. 8px. Apply as top-left + bottom-right only (asymmetric). Set in Figma component directly: TL=8, TR=0, BL=0, BR=8.

size.$description: Promo corner size. 28×28px square badge.

title-size.$description: Promo corner title font size. 8px for '免運' text. Uses label-2xs (updated to 8px).

price-symbol-size.$description: Promo corner price symbol size. 10px for '$' symbol.

price-value-size.$description: Promo corner price value size. 14px Bold for '99' number.

background.$description: Promo corner tag bg. Red for 免運$99 corner badge.

text-color.$description: Promo corner text. White on red.

border-width.$description: Card border width. No border when elevation is used.

border-radius.$description: Card corner radius. 8px rounded corners.

elevation.$description: Card shadow. Subtle lift for product cards at rest.

gap.$description: Gap between card sections (image, content, footer). 8px.

padding-h.$description: Card content horizontal padding. 4px.

width.$description: Card width for sm (mobile) size. 109px for compact product grid.

background.$description: Card background. White surface for product cards.

border-color.$description: Card border. Subtle border for card edges.

border-radius.$description: Image corner radius. 8px, slightly less than container.

aspect-ratio.$description: Image aspect ratio. Square for product thumbnails.

size.$description: Image size for sm card. 109×109 square.

background.$description: Image placeholder background. Light grey when image not loaded.

border-radius.$description: Badge corner radius. 4px subtle rounding.

padding-h.$description: Badge horizontal padding. 8px.

font-size.$description: Badge font size. 10px for compact labels.

background.$description: Primary badge bg. Orange for '商城' badge.

text-color.$description: Primary badge text. White on orange.

background.$description: Secondary badge bg. Soft orange for '天天超划算' etc.

text-color.$description: Secondary badge text. Dark orange on soft orange.

font-size.$description: Product title font size. 10px for compact card (sm size). PingFang TC Medium.

line-clamp.$description: Max lines for title. 2 lines with ellipsis.

color.$description: Product title color. Dark text (#161619→ via neutral/900). Note: Figma currently uses neutral/800 (#33343B), should align to on-surface.

gap.$description: Gap between current and original price. 4px.

font-size.$description: Current price font size. 12px SF Pro Bold.

color.$description: Current price color. Red (#FF4E51) for promotional emphasis.

font-size.$description: Original price font size. 12px smaller.

decoration.$description: Original price strikethrough. Line-through for crossed-out price.

font-size.$description: Meta text font size. 8px (label-2xs) for '銷售999+'. Smallest readable size.

border-radius.$description: Shipping tag radius. 4px.

font-size.$description: Shipping tag font size. 10px.

padding-h.$description: Shipping tag horizontal padding. 4px.

background.$description: Shipping tag bg (預購). Blue info color.

text-color.$description: Shipping tag text. White on blue.

border-radius.$description: Brand badge radius. 4px.

font-size.$description: Brand badge font size. 10px Medium.

padding-h.$description: Brand badge horizontal padding. 4px.

padding-v.$description: Brand badge vertical padding. 2→4px (aligned to token grid).

icon-size.$description: Brand badge icon size. Inherits from comp/tag/icon-size (12px via sys/sizing/icon-xs).

gap.$description: Icon-text gap in brand badge. Inherits from comp/tag/icon-gap (2px).

background.$description: Brand badge bg (露天心選). Red badge with icon.

text-color.$description: Brand badge text. White.

size.$description: Icon xs size. 12px. Use for compact tag icons (e.g. 露天心選 badge icon), inline micro-indicators.

color.$description: Icon xs default color. Muted tone for secondary/decorative micro-icons.

size.$description: Icon sm size. 16px. Use for inline indicators, status dots, compact action icons.

color.$description: Icon sm default color. Standard foreground for small functional icons.

size.$description: Icon md size. 24px. Default icon size. Use for navigation, action bars, form fields.

color.$description: Icon md default color. Standard foreground for primary action icons.

size.$description: Icon lg size. 32px. Use for empty states, feature highlights, prominent actions.

color.$description: Icon lg default color. Standard foreground for large prominent icons.

size.$description: Badge dot size. 8px diameter. For NEW indicators on quick-access icons.

color.$description: Badge dot color. Red. Standard notification dot color.

min-size.$description: Badge count min size. 16px. Minimum diameter for number badges.

font-size.$description: Badge count font size. 8px. Compact number text.

font-weight.$description: Badge count font weight. 600. Bold for readability.

background.$description: Badge count background. Red. For cart count (1), unread messages (25).

text-color.$description: Badge count text. White on red.

border-radius.$description: Badge count border-radius. 999px pill/circle. Always fully rounded.

padding-h.$description: Badge count horizontal padding. 4px. For multi-digit numbers.

offset-x.$description: Badge position offset-x. -4px. Overlaps parent element's top-right corner.

offset-y.$description: Badge position offset-y. -4px. Overlaps parent element's top-right corner.

color.$description: Divider line color. Light grey. Default for horizontal and vertical dividers.

thickness-hairline.$description: Divider hairline thickness. 0.5px. Use for subtle separation between list items.

thickness-default.$description: Divider default thickness. 1px. Use for standard section separation.

thickness-heavy.$description: Divider heavy thickness. 2px. Use for strong visual separation between major sections.

spacing.$description: Divider surrounding spacing. 8px. Margin above and below the divider line.

size.$description: Avatar xs size. 24px. Use for inline mentions, compact lists.
Avatar sm size. 32px. Use for comment authors, chat bubbles.
Avatar md size. 40px. Use for navigation bar, list items.
Avatar lg size. 48px. Use for seller info, profile sections.
Avatar xl size. 80px. Use for featured topic grid, seller highlights.
Avatar 2xl size. 96px. Use for category index hero thumbnails.

border-radius.$description: Avatar shape. Circle (9999px). All avatars are circular.

background.$description: Avatar fallback background. White. Show when image is loading or missing.

border-width.$description: Avatar active border width. 2px. Use for selected/highlighted avatar.

border-color.$description: Avatar active border color. Brand orange. Use for selected/highlighted avatar. Pair with comp/avatar/active/border-width.

border-width.$description: Avatar default border width. 0px. No border in default state.

size.$description: Thumbnail xs size. 24px. Use for compact grids, inline category icons.
Thumbnail sm size. 32px. Use for small category lists.
Thumbnail md size. 40px. Use for standard category grids.
Thumbnail lg size. 48px. Use for featured category entries.
Thumbnail xl size. 80px. Use for featured topic grid (焦點主題), IP selector.
Thumbnail 2xl size. 96px. Use for hero category thumbnails.

border-radius.$description: Thumbnail shape. Circle (9999px) by default. Future: may add square variant for product thumbnails.

background.$description: Thumbnail fallback background. White. Show when image is loading or missing.

border-width.$description: Thumbnail active border width. 2px. Use for selected/highlighted thumbnail in selector pattern.

border-color.$description: Thumbnail active border color. Brand orange. Use for selected thumbnail in IP selector, category grid.

border-width.$description: Thumbnail default border width. 0px. No border in default state.

height.$description: SearchBar input field height. 32px. Use for default search input on navigation bar.

background.$description: SearchBar input field background. White. Use for default state input area.

border-color.$description: SearchBar input field border color. Light grey. Use for default state border.

border-radius.$description: SearchBar input field border radius. Pill shape (9999px).

padding-h.$description: SearchBar input field horizontal padding. 16px.

placeholder-color.$description: SearchBar placeholder text color. Subdued grey. Use for hint text when empty.

icon-size.$description: SearchBar icon size. 24px. Use for search and action icons.

icon-gap.$description: Gap between left icon and input field. 12px.

border-color.$description: SearchBar focused state border color. Brand orange. Use when user taps the search field.

border-width.$description: SearchBar focused state border width. 2px. Thicker border to indicate active focus.

height.$description: NavigationBar row height. 48px. Excludes system StatusBar. Use for the main action bar below status bar.

background.$description: NavigationBar background color. Brand orange. Use for primary navigation context (home, category). Pair with on-surface-brand for icon/text color.

padding-h.$description: NavigationBar horizontal padding. 16px. Both left and right.

icon-color.$description: NavigationBar icon color on brand background. White. Use for back arrow, cart, notification icons.

height.$description: BottomNav total height. 80px. Includes safe area for gesture navigation.

background.$description: BottomNav background. Dark surface (neutral/900).

border-radius.$description: BottomNav top corner radius. 16px. Top-left and top-right only.

elevation.$description: BottomNav upward shadow. Floating effect above content.

padding-top.$description: BottomNav top padding. 24px. Space from top edge to tab icons.

icon-text-gap.$description: Gap between tab icon and label. 4px.

text-color.$description: BottomNav tab label default color. Light orange on dark background.

text-color-active.$description: BottomNav active tab label color. Brand orange.

size.$description: BottomNav center action button size. 40px. The prominent listing/create button.

border-radius.$description: BottomNav center button shape. Circle (9999px).

background.$description: BottomNav center button background. Brand orange. Primary CTA.

icon-text-gap.$description: Gap between icon and title text. 4px.

title-color.$description: SectionHeader title color. Dark grey. Use on white/light surface sections.

title-color-inverse.$description: SectionHeader title color on brand surface. White. Use on orange background sections like leaderboard.

subtitle-color.$description: SectionHeader subtitle color. White. Use for date range or secondary info on brand surface.

padding-h.$description: SectionHeader horizontal padding. 16px. Aligns with page-level content padding.

height.$description: Row min-height for mobile/app. 24px. Aliases icon-md — height matches leading icon for single-line vertical centering. May diverge if subtitle or padding-v is added later.
Row min-height for PC. 32px. Aliases icon-lg — height matches leading icon for single-line vertical centering.

title-font-weight.$description: Title font weight. Semibold 600. Consistent across all sizes.

background.$description: Section module container background. White.

border-radius.$description: Section module top/bottom cap corner radius. 16px.

padding-h.$description: Section module horizontal content padding. 16px. Aligns with page-level grid.

cap-height.$description: Section module top/bottom decorative cap height. 16px.

gap-header-to-content.$description: Gap between SectionHeader and first content slot. 16px.

gap-content-to-footer.$description: Gap between last content slot and footer action. 24px.

gap-between-slots.$description: Gap between Slot A (filter) and Slot B (content). 16px.

border-radius.$description: Banner container corner radius. 12px. Use for all banner variants.

background.$description: Banner container default background. White. Override with brand color or image for themed banners.

padding.$description: Banner container inner padding. 16px. For full-bleed image banners, set to 0 in implementation.

min-height.$description: Banner container minimum height. 48px. Prevents collapsed empty state. Actual height determined by content or explicit height prop.
